testcase.name: TC-CLEANUP-003: No archived filenames found in active source paths
TC-CLEANUP-004: No dirty-named files found in active source tree
TC-CLEANUP-006: No unexpected .c/.h files at repo root
TC-CLEANUP-007: No stray scripts at repo root
TC-WIN11-004: Device node accessible on Windows 11
UT-DEV-ENUM-003: Enumeration with No Adapters: Requires adapter removal
UT-DEV-HW-STATE-002: Hardware State During D3 Transition: Requires power management control
UT-DEV-HW-STATE-003: Link State Detection: Requires manual cable toggle
UT-DEV-LIFECYCLE-002: Initialization After Failed Start: Requires failure injection mechanism
UT-DEV-LIFECYCLE-003: Hot-Plug Device Detection: Requires manual hot-plug operation
UT-DEV-LIFECYCLE-004: Graceful Shutdown Sequence: Requires driver shutdown test framework
UT-DEV-LIFECYCLE-005: PnP Remove and Re-Add: Requires Device Manager control or devcon
TC-EEE-003: MDIO read MMD 3.20 EEE Capability
TC-EEE-005: MDIO read MMD 7.60 EEE Advertisement
TC-LAT4-005: No priority inversion across 4 channels
TC-PNP-003 was skipped; cannot test re-enable
TC-ACCTL-002: Read-only handle rejects write IOCTL
TC-FUZZ-001: NULL/zero-size buffers ÔÇö no crash
TC-FUZZ-002: NULL input non-zero length ÔÇö rejected
TC-FUZZ-003: Undersized buffers ÔÇö no crash
UT-LAUNCH-001: Requires GPIO TX timestamp measurement ÔÇö oscilloscope + hardware rig needed
UT-LAUNCH-002: Requires hardware measurement rig with sub-┬Ás resolution
UT-LAUNCH-003: Requires TX packet injection + GPIO timestamp capture hardware
UT-LAUNCH-005: Requires TAS (IOCTL_AVB_SETUP_TAS) configured with matching GCL
UT-LAUNCH-006: Requires CBS bandwidth allocation + launch time combined hardware test
UT-LAUNCH-008: Requires PHC near UINT64_MAX overflow ÔÇö impractical in normal test environment
UT-LAUNCH-009: Requires simultaneous TX on multiple TC queues with hardware measurement
IT-LAUNCH-001: Requires two I225/I226 NICs synchronised via gPTP ÔÇö hardware lab configuration
IT-LAUNCH-002: Requires CBS + launch time combined hardware traffic generation
IT-LAUNCH-003: Requires 48kHz audio stream playback with AVB talker/listener hardware
VV-LAUNCH-001: Requires 24-hour hardware soak ÔÇö cannot run in automated CI
VV-LAUNCH-002: Requires IEC 61000-4-x EMI test chamber and calibrated interference source
VV-PHC-QUERY-001: Latency Benchmark: IOCTL p95=23400 ns, min=12400 ns, max=48500 ns
TC-TARGET-EVENT-001: Ring buffer mapping not yet implemented
UT-VERSION-002: Buffer size correct (12 bytes = sizeof(IOCTL_VERSION)) Ô£ô
[Adapter0[VEN_8086:DEV_125B]] TC-LCY-001: FilterAttachCount]=1 and FilterRestartCount]=1 after bind
[Adapter0[VEN_8086:DEV_125B]] TC-LCY-003: Gauge invariants - OutstandingNBLs and OutstandingOids in sane range

[Adapter0[VEN_8086:DEV_125B]] TC-LCY-006: NIC disable/re-enable - Pause+Restart deltas and zero NBL gauges

UT-MDIO-003: Multi-Page PHY Access: Vendor-specific, requires PHY identification
UT-MDIO-007: MDIO Bus Timeout Handling: Requires PHY simulation or hardware fault injection
UT-MDIO-008: Concurrent MDIO Access Serialization: Requires multi-threaded test framework
UT-MDIO-013: Cable Diagnostics via MDIO: Vendor-specific registers
UT-MDIO-014: MDIO Access During Low Power: Requires power management test framework
TC-DEV-I225-001: No I225 hardware found on this machine.
TC-DEV-I225-001: SKIPPED (hardware not present) ÔÇö counted as pass.
TC-PERF-REG-001: PASS: PHC P50 2389 ns [= baseline 4859 ns
TC-PERF-REG-002: PASS: PHC P99 6717 ns [= baseline 23097 ns
TC-PERF-REG-003: PASS: TX median 400 ns [= baseline 387 ns
TC-PERF-REG-004: PASS: RX median 2440 ns [= baseline 3499 ns
TC-PERF-REG-005: PASS: Baseline file write/read round-trip fidelity confirmed
TC-PFC-004: MDIO read MMD 7.19 PAUSE capability
TC-PWRMGMT-005: Concurrent handle survives partner cycle
TC-PTP-001-CORR Rate stable ]=80% within +-5% of mean
UT-CORR-010 SEND_PTP with TS disabled: no crash/hang
UT-CORR-010 Driver responds after TS disable/re-enable
TC-PTP-LAT-004: Stress receive 60 s, zero drops
UT-PTP-GETSET-009: Clock Resolution: Clock running, IOCTL delta = 20605 ns
UT-PTP-GETSET-014: Privilege Enforcement ÔÇö SET denied (error 87, expected ERROR_ACCESS_DENIED=5) [DRIVER NOTE: should return STATUS_ACCESS_DENIED per #195]
UT-CORR-005 Epoch Reset: seed correct, advancing, TX-PHC correlated
UT-CORR-006 Freq Adj: IOCTL OK, PHC advancing, TX-PHC correlated
UT-CORR-009 Driver Reload: re-open OK, PHC valid, TX-PHC correlated
TC-DEBUG-REG-002: Parameters key re-opened after close
TC-DEBUG-REG-005: IOCTL_AVB_GET_CLOCK_CONFIG failed before handle close (err=122) ÔÇö may need debug driver
TC-DEBUG-REG-006: deferred ÔÇö manual execution required
UT-RX-TS-015: Queue Enable Without Global: Driver accepted
TC-PERF-TS-006/adapter:0: PASS: All threads median [1┬Ás, P99 [20┬Ás

UT-TS-EVENT-001: RX Timestamp Event Delivery: No RX events received
UT-TS-EVENT-002: TX Timestamp Event Delivery: No TX events received
UT-TS-PERF-001: High Event Rate Performance: Requires sustained traffic generation (10K events/sec) - benchmark test
UT-TS-EVENT-003: Target Time Reached Event: TRGTTIML0 stuck at hardware-reset value - adapter not responding to register writes
VV-CORR-001 PHC correlation stable over 86400-second run
